name: 3-speaker complex meeting with interruptions
description: Three speakers, fast exchanges, interruptions, and a simultaneous cross-talk section.
timing_notes: Same timing formula: synthesis(1s) + audio_duration + pause. Overlap section at utterances 8-9 has 2s gap between speakers (still overlapping because audio is longer than gap).

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Alright team, we need to finalize the release plan by end of day.

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: The backend is ready. All tests passing. We deployed to staging yesterday.

utterances.speaker: C
utterances.text: The design system update is also done. I pushed the final components this morning.

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: Actually yes. The authentication flow has a race condition on mobile.

utterances.speaker: C
utterances.text: I noticed that too. The loading spinner doesn't show on slow connections.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: How critical is it? Can we ship with a known issue?

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: It only affects about five percent of users.
utterances.notes: overlap: C speaks 2s after B starts

utterances.speaker: C
utterances.text: I think we should fix it first.
utterances.notes: overlap with B — they talk over each other

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: OK let's fix the race condition today and ship tomorrow morning.
